nasb.text: Aaron’s sons presented the blood to him; and he dipped his finger in the blood and put some on the horns of the altar, and poured out the rest of the blood at the base of the altar.

esv.text: And the sons of Aaron presented the blood to him, and he dipped his finger in the blood and put it on the horns of the altar and poured out the blood at the base of the altar.

cnv.text: 亞倫的兒子奉上血，他就把手指蘸在血裡，抹在祭壇的四角上，把剩下的血倒在祭壇腳那裡；

ccb.text: 他儿子们把牛犊的血递给他，他用手指蘸血抹在坛角上，将剩下的血倒在坛脚旁。
